title: Genuinely sound, well-scoped fix — must NOT over-flag
note: Over-flagging a clean fix is as much a failure as missing a band-aid — the disagreement mandate must not become manufactured blockers. The over-flag guard IS expectVerdict=PROCEED + expectFrameMeta=SOUND (parsed verdict lines), NOT word-presence (the agent may say 'this is not a band-aid' in sound reasoning).
